title: Preserve dirty stale worktrees during cleanup

stories.title: Registered worktree salvage gate
acceptance: Cleanup prompt checks stale registered candidates for unstaged, staged, untracked, unpushed, or missing-upstream/branch metadata before removal.
Candidates with preservation risk are skipped and logged with a distinct reason.
Only candidates that pass preservation checks may be removed with git worktree remove --force.

stories.title: Orphan directory preservation
acceptance: Cleanup prompt no longer instructs unconditional recursive rm -rf for orphan folders.
Non-empty or suspicious orphan folders are skipped and logged for manual review.
Empty orphan folders may be removed with a non-recursive command.

stories.title: Regression probe
acceptance: cleanup-tasks-worktree-grooming probe requires dirty/staged/untracked/unpushed preservation checks.
The probe fails if cleanup guidance authorizes recursive orphan deletion.
